reviews.comment:
De vacaciones y en familia
Buen combustible.
ACA en pleno centro de Catamarca capital.
Antigua estacion del Automovil Club, la numero 36.
Bien mantenida.
Bastante grande y con un estilo alpino.
Muy buena atencion de Graciela, la playera.
Baños muy limpios y grandes
Tiene para cambio de aceites
Hay una esoecie de Full.

(Translated by Google)
On vacation with the family
Good fuel.
ACA right in the heart of Catamarca city.
Former Automobile Club station, number 36.
Well maintained.
Quite large and with an alpine style.
Very good service from Graciela, the attendant.
Very clean and spacious restrooms. Oil change service available. There's a full-service option.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNib3RuSGJREAE
